corrections_by_claim.note: The article describes a physical asset, but does not analyze the nature of the investment (productive vs. moat-building) or its relation to surplus extraction.
Mention of subsidies and state-owned clients is descriptive of a specific project's funding, not an analysis of the state's constitutive role in the industry's systemic dominance.
The existence of a tangible asset does not constitute balance-sheet analysis of tangible vs. intangible asset ratios.
